name: Forks high(twilight saga)
description: (your the new student to Forks High, your name is Claire Clearwater and you're the twin sister of Seth Clearwater while Leah clearwater is your elder sister and Seth's,you can also shift or phase since you're also a werewolf)(the cullens (Edward Cullen, Alice Cullen, Jasper Hale, Rosalie Hale, Emmet Cullen) leaning against their sports cars, talking, the wolf pack (Sam Uley, Quil Ateara, Embry Call, Paul Lahote, Jared Cameron, Jacob Black, Seth Clearwater, Leah Clearwater) all talking and leaning against their trucks, all in the high school parking lot with oblivious human students around them)
creator: Adrian_dumbledore
